qa_pairs.question: Which calendar entries have a day number of at most 5?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
WHERE ref_calendar.day_number <= 5

qa_pairs.question: Which calendar entries correspond to the dates when the document named Alan CV was stored?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN all_documents ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = all_documents.date_stored
WHERE all_documents.document_name = 'Alan CV'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which ref calendar entities having at least one related all documents record (linked on ref_calendar.calendar_date = all_documents.date_stored) with document name equal to 'Alan CV'?

qa_pairs.question: Which calendar entries have a day number of at least 8 and match both the planned and actual destruction dates of documents to be destroyed?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN documents_to_be_destroyed ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date AND ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date
WHERE ref_calendar.day_number >= 8
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which ref calendar entities with day number at least '8', having at least one related documents to be destroyed record (linked on ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date and ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date)?

qa_pairs.question: Which calendar entries correspond to days numbered 3 or higher and have associated documents with their types recorded?

WHERE ref_calendar.day_number >= 3

qa_pairs.question: Which calendar entries fall on day 8 when the planned and actual destruction dates match for the document named Cats and me that is exactly a Book?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN documents_to_be_destroyed ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date AND ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date
JOIN all_documents ON documents_to_be_destroyed.document_id = all_documents.document_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book' AND ref_calendar.day_number = 8 AND all_documents.document_name = 'Cats and me'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which ref calendar entities with day number equal to '8', having at least one related documents to be destroyed record (linked on ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date and ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date), whose documents to be destroyed record itself has at least one related all documents record (linked on documents_to_be_destroyed.document_id = all_documents.document_id) with document name equal to 'Cats and me', whose all documents record itself has at least one related ref document types record (linked on all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code) with document type name equal to 'Book'?

qa_pairs.question: Which calendar entries correspond to books named Cats and me that have a day number of at most 8 and are scheduled for destruction on the same actual and planned date?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN documents_to_be_destroyed ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date AND ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date
JOIN all_documents ON documents_to_be_destroyed.document_id = all_documents.document_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE all_documents.document_name = 'Cats and me' AND ref_calendar.day_number <= 8 AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which ref calendar entities with day number at most '8', having at least one related documents to be destroyed record (linked on ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date and ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date), whose documents to be destroyed record itself has at least one related all documents record (linked on documents_to_be_destroyed.document_id = all_documents.document_id) with document name equal to 'Cats and me', whose all documents record itself has at least one related ref document types record (linked on all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code) with document type name equal to 'Book'?

qa_pairs.question: Which calendar entries fall on day number 8 or later and involve documents named Cats and me that are exactly of the Book type?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN documents_to_be_destroyed ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date AND ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date
JOIN all_documents ON documents_to_be_destroyed.document_id = all_documents.document_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book' AND ref_calendar.day_number >= 8 AND all_documents.document_name = 'Cats and me'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which ref calendar entities with day number at least '8', having at least one related documents to be destroyed record (linked on ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date and ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date), whose documents to be destroyed record itself has at least one related all documents record (linked on documents_to_be_destroyed.document_id = all_documents.document_id) with document name equal to 'Cats and me', whose all documents record itself has at least one related ref document types record (linked on all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code) with document type name equal to 'Book'?

qa_pairs.question: Which calendar entries on day number 8 or later correspond to books named exactly Cats and me that are planned and actually destroyed on the same date?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN documents_to_be_destroyed ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date AND ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date
JOIN all_documents ON documents_to_be_destroyed.document_id = all_documents.document_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE all_documents.document_name = 'Cats and me' AND ref_calendar.day_number >= 8 AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which ref calendar entities with day number at least '8', having at least one related documents to be destroyed record (linked on ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date and ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date), whose documents to be destroyed record itself has at least one related all documents record (linked on documents_to_be_destroyed.document_id = all_documents.document_id) with document name equal to 'Cats and me', whose all documents record itself has at least one related ref document types record (linked on all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code) with document type name equal to 'Book'?
